com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException

Description
com.example._0tazo.model

  • Uses of GameException in com.example._0tazo.model

    Methods in com.example._0tazo.model that throw GameException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Game.checkCurrentPlayerElimination()
    Checks whether the current player has any legal move and eliminates them automatically if not.
    void
    Game.computerTakeTurn()
    Executes a full computer player turn automatically: chooses the best card, plays it, and draws a replacement card.
    void
    Game.currentPlayerDrawCard()
    Makes the current player draw a card from the deck.
    void
    AbstractPlayer.drawCard(Deck deck)
    Draws the top card from the main deck and adds it to the hand.
    void
    IPlayer.drawCard(Deck deck)
    Draws the top card from the main deck and adds it to the hand.
    void
    Game.eliminateCurrentPlayer()
    Eliminates the current player: sends their cards to the deck, removes them from the list, and adjusts the turn index.
    void
    Game.humanPlayCard(int cardIndex)
    Processes the human player's chosen card.
    void
    Table.placeInitialCard()
    Deals one card face up from the deck and places it on the table, initializing the table sum with that card's value.
    Card
    AbstractPlayer.playCard(int index, Deck deck)
    Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.
    Card
    IPlayer.playCard(int index, Deck deck)
    Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.
    void
    Game.setup()
    Prepares the game: deals 4 cards to each player and places the initial card on the table to set the starting sum.
    (package private) void
    GameTest.setUp()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testComputerTurnKeepsHandSize()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testEliminateCardsGoToDeck()

    GameTest.testEliminateRemovesPlayer()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testEliminationWhenNoLegalMove()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testGameEndsWithOnePlayer()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testGetWinnerAfterGameEnds()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testHumanPlayCardReducesHandSize()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testHumanPlayCardThrowsInvalidTurn()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testNextTurnMarksGameOver()
     
    (package private) void
    GameTest.testNextTurnWrapsAround()

    GameTest.testTableSumUpdatesAfterPlay()
     

  • Uses of GameException in com.example._0tazo.model.exception

    Subclasses of GameException in com.example._0tazo.model.exception
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    GameException.EmptyDeckException
    Thrown when a card is requested from the deck but both the main deck and the discard pile are empty, making it impossible to deal any card.
    static class 
    GameException.InvalidTurnException
    Thrown when a player attempts to take an action outside of their turn.
    static class 
    GameException.PlayerEliminatedException
    Thrown when an eliminated player attempts to perform any game action.
    static class 
    GameException.SumExceededException
    Thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50, violating the main rule of Cincuentazo.
